title: Sweet and Savory Skillet Delight
description: A harmonious blend of sweet and savory flavors, all in one skillet. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat 1 tbsp of oil over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until caramelized, stirring occasionally.
Add the cooked chicken, Gruyere cheese, savory skillet seasoning, and Chinese five-spice powder to the skillet.
Stir to combine and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Stir in the sour cream and cook for an additional minute.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 5-7 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
